message:
chore(gates): update section 10.10 + 10.13 verification evidence

Section 10.13: 33 bead evidence files updated from FAIL (stale placeholder)
to PASS — all test checks now reflect actual 1978 connector tests passing.
Gate regenerated: 46/46 beads PASS.

Section 10.10: added timestamp and bd-ac8j gap closure to gate evidence.
51/51 checks PASS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
